user.title: Connect to AE-200E / EW-50E
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Mitsubishi AE-200E or EW-50E controller (LAN1 interface). Multiple controllers can be added as separate entries.

data_description.host: The LAN1 IP address or hostname of the controller (e.g. 192.168.1.10)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the controller. Check the IP address and ensure it is reachable on LAN1.
